text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to build Jordan's talents even more, she and I are taking part
in the summer training camp.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Raaah! All right, one more lap! Come on, Trainer, let's go extra hard
today! Uraugh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Totally Tosen! I wanna go to the festival tonight in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, didn't you hear? There's a HUGE festival tonight at a nearby
shrine!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And I'm hella stoked for it. I'm 100% going, so don't you DARE extend practice today. I'll make sure we finish everything on time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait a minute... If you didn't know, that means you weren't
planning on going to the festival, right? Got something else planned
then?
choice_data_list: No, I'll just be organizing my training notes.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh... You're one serious trainer, all right. Well, whatever. I'm gonna
go warm up for the next exercise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, true to her word, Tosen Jordan gives practice her all. Once
we finish, she swiftly makes her way to the festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or at least, I thought she would...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are. Come on, we're headed out.
choice_data_list: Huh? Weren't you going to the festival?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I am, and you're coming with me. Now let's hurry up and go.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You know, I'm pretty goated when it comes to carnival games, but someone's gotta carry my prizes. Can't eat cotton candy with full hands, now, can I?
choice_data_list: So you want me to do it?
So you want me to do it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Sure do. And since I don't hear a "no," I'm guessing you're okay with
it? Good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, I find myself half-dragged over to the summer festival.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh. My. GOSH. What are you doing here?! And wearing a yukata too! And—hold on, isn't that your crush?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend
text_block_list.text: Shhh! Don't be so loud! This is why I didn't tell anyone I was coming!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, right, I bet you wanted to show off! Anyway, I better get
evidence for later. Trainer, take a picture of us! Say cheeeese!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You don't have anyone to take a photo of you two together, do you?
I'll take one. I'll even make it super cute before I send it to you. Make
a peace sign!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, what's with these chocolate bananas? They're practically glow sticks. I'm gonna go blind!

text_block_list.name: Game Operator
text_block_list.text:
Gimme a break, kid. I'm trying to keep up with the times! You
youngsters like taking pictures, right? I thought these would be good,
but did I go too far?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No way! This is PEAK festival cuisine! I 100% stan these banans. I'll
take one. How about you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What, you scared? This is literally a banana glow-up. Get in here and get your hands covered in neon chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, haha! You looked so serious there! Well, glad you're getting into
the vibes. Let's take a selfie with these two bananas.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue to explore the festival, and I'm surprised by how much
fun we're having. We may not be close friends, but we seem to enjoy
each other's company.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boom...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes! Fireworks! Now this is giving festival.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You do?! We finally found something we have in common, then! Huh,
I had no idea...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Although, I guess there aren't many people who hate fireworks. Guess we're not really vibing after all.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean... We're so different, you know? I was just thinking, wouldn't it
be nice if we had, like, one thing in common?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That way, even if we are from different planets, we can at least enjoy something together. Guess I've been kinda worried about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So that's why she brought me to the festival. She's been trying to
connect with me, in her own way.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Fireworks aren't the best common interest, huh... Yeah, no good.
Guess we're gonna be stuck as complete strangers, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It is?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While we may not understand each other, we've both shown that we want to. If Tosen Jordan has taught me anything, it's that the desire to understand is what's most important.
choice_data_list: Thanks for trying to understand me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Um... Whatever. I still think it'd be better if we vibed more.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whether it'd be food, comedy, clothes, or just... vibes. It'd be so much better and easier if we were the same.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's annoying studying stuff we don't understand, right? Like,
watching UmaToks or comedy shows you don't find funny just feels so
cringe.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But... If that's how it's gotta be, I guess I'm okay with it. At least we
agree that fireworks are pretty...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can still feel some distance from Tosen Jordan as she mumbles away.
However, I know that the more we talk, the more that distance will
close itself.
